JHIN-BULLET.title: Bullets
JHIN-BULLET.description: Jhin's firing resource. Most shoot cards spend 1 Bullet; when Bullets reach 0, the magazine must be reloaded.
JHIN-FLOURISH.title: Flourish
JHIN-FLOURISH.description: Triggers when a shoot card truly spends the last Bullet. Flourish resolves that card's flourish effect and triggers related relic, skill, and Power effects.
